steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The word “allowed” signals the finding's importance: the unchanged community composition “allowed Kaštovská et al. to attribute the acceleration to temperature-induced increases in microorganism activity.” This word reveals that the finding was essential for reaching their conclusion.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice C identifies the critical function: the unchanged composition ruled out the alternative that different microorganisms caused the acceleration, allowing researchers to attribute the faster cycling to temperature-induced activity increases. A, B, and D address something else—the acceleration's occurrence, geographic reach, or organism-dependent activity variation. This matches choice C — C is correct.
